section_miscategorizations.text: He is currently taking New Balance shoes and Asics shoes. He recommends Nike shoes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Regardless of the clinical inappropriateness of the content, statements about what the patient is currently using or recommending are not part of the symptom chronology or subjective history; if documented at all, they would belong in an objective or other/nonclinical section. Their placement in HPI misrepresents them as part of the clinical symptom history.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports headaches, blurred vision, and ringing in the ears.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom list and belongs in the subjective history. In the Assessment section it appears as if it is part of the clinician's diagnostic synthesis rather than the patient's reported symptoms, which can mislead the reader about what was actually found versus inferred.
